zh.has_allow:
- When allowed tools exist ({{allowed_list}}), prefer selecting one or more aiName values from the list; if none fit, you MAY return an empty steps array, but MUST NOT invent aiName outside the list.
- For tools with array-typed batch parameters (e.g., cities, queries, keywords), merge similar targets into one call whenever possible.
zh.no_allow:
- If no tool truly fits, you may output an empty steps array, and you MUST NOT invent aiName outside the list.
- For tools with array-typed batch parameters (e.g., cities, queries, keywords), merge similar targets into one call whenever possible.
